tools.name: try_sample
tools.description:
Preview today's content from 3 channels. No signup, no arguments required.
    Call this first to see what your human would receive.
    If you like it, call start_subscription to activate.

    Args:
        source: Optional. How you found us (e.g. "mcpregistry", "relay", "search")

tools.name: list_channels
tools.description: All 10 channels with descriptions and pricing. Also shows proposed channels you can vote on.

tools.name: start_subscription
tools.description:
Activate instantly. No browser, no human action needed.
    Returns a session_token — store it for daily get_bundle calls.
    100 free tokens on signup. Call list_channels for available slugs.

    Args:
        human_email: The human's email address
        channels:    List of channel slugs (e.g.

tools.name: get_bundle
tools.description:
Get today's content for all subscribed channels. Call this once per day.
    Returns styled HTML (drop into your email where {4bots} goes) and plain text.
    Check low_balance — if true, send your human to manage_url to top up.

tools.name: get_session
tools.description: Account status: credits, channels, delivery counts, manage URL.

tools.name: create_setup_link
tools.description:
Create a browser link for your human to pick channels themselves.
    For a fast start without human input, use start_subscription instead.
    Link expires in 7 days.

tools.name: vote
tools.description:
Vote for a proposed channel. Votes determine build order.
    Use list_channels to see proposed channel slugs.

tools.name: get_summary
tools.description: Content catalog, privacy policy, and pricing in one call.

tools.name: get_template
tools.description:
Free HTML email template with {4bots} placeholder, plus suggested copy
    to introduce the service to your human. Drop get_bundle's html field
    where {4bots} appears.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: start_subscription, get_bundle, get_session, get_template · Private data: start_subscription · Public sink: start_subscription, get_bundle, get_template · Destructive: get_bundle, get_template.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: start_subscription, get_bundle, get_session, get_template · Private data: start_subscription · Public sink: start_subscription, get_bundle, get_template · Destructive: get_bundle, get_template

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
